title: PROWRAP | Silicone-Coated Baking Parchment Roll | 300mm x 50m | Non-Stick, Greaseproof & Freezer Safe Baking Paper | Compostable & Biodegradable | for Home Baking, Cooking & Catering Kitchens
features: Grease-Free Silicone Coating Eliminates the need for oil or butter – this silicone-coated parchment paper delivers a clean, non-stick surface for baking, roasting or wrapping, helping reduce fat and mess in the kitchen.
Perfect for All Baking Applications Ideal for baking bread, cakes, cookies, pastries or oven-roasted meals. Can also be used as a non-stick layer for food prep and lining trays or tins.
Freezer Safe & Fridge Ready Preserve freshness and protect ingredients in cold storage. Great for separating layers of baked goods, dough, or chilled food in commercial or home kitchens.
Compostable & Biodegradable Paper Made from eco-friendly materials – fully compostable and biodegradable. A sustainable alternative to foil or plastic-based baking liners.
Strong, Tear-Resistant, Reliable Highly durable and heat-resistant up to standard oven temperatures. Won’t tear, curl or absorb grease, even with moist or sticky mixtures.
Large 50m Roll – Easy to Use & Store Supplied as a 300mm x 50m roll for versatile kitchen use. Simply cut to size. Suitable for home baking, professional chefs, and large-scale catering operations.
